creator: bacon11@tds.net
text:
I've been unable to reproduce the problem under the latest ports snapshot on 
FreeBSD 6.2.  I've built AFNI successfully with several versions of the 
nVidia driver installed.  I suspect that the user who encountered it has some 
older ports installed, or maybe a corrupted port installation.  At this time, 
I have to reject the patch.

Regards,

	Jason
